subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call, and have manifested Ourselves unto thee from the horizon of this mighty Prison. Give thanks unto God, thy Lord, inasmuch as His glance hath been directed towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و تجلینا علیک من افق هذا السجن العظیم ان اشکر الله ربک بما توجه الیک طرفه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
